entries.summary: Added history.py script to generate self-contained HTML timeline from .cicadas/archive specs and index.json; added 'project history' builder command and history.py to skill.md CLI reference
Tweak complete: history.py generates self-contained HTML project timeline from archive specs and index ledger; skill.md updated with history builder command
Fixed branch.py to use initiative name for active dir path; added conftest.py to fix test collection; added 2 tests covering tweak/fix active dir convention; cleaned up orphaned active dirs
Bug fix complete: active dir convention unified to initiative name across all branch types

Added abort.py: context-aware escape hatch that detects branch type (tweak/fix/feat/initiative) and rolls back the appropriate scope, with prompt to move active specs to drafts or delete them. Updated SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, and added 14 unit tests at 86% coverage.
Fixed archive.py to deregister associated branches when archiving an initiative; cleaned up orphaned registry entries; added regression test
Bug fix complete: archive.py now cleans up associated branches on initiative archive

Implemented install.sh core: Python 3.13+ check with OS-specific guidance, GitHub archive download+extract, init.py call, --update flag. Includes agent integration scaffold. CLAUDE.md updated for .venv Python 3.13.
Updated README.md and HOW-TO.md: one-liner curl install, --agent flag docs (claude-code, antigravity, cursor, none), --update workflow. All agent integration tasks complete.

Completed installer initiative: install.sh with Python 3.13+ check, GitHub archive download, init.py bootstrap, --update flag, agent integrations (claude-code/antigravity/cursor), interactive prompt with tty detection. README and HOW-TO updated with one-liner. Canon updated: product-overview + tech-overview.
Changed installer default INSTALL_DIR from src/cicadas to .cicadas-skill/cicadas. Updated HOW-TO.md (3 references) and README.md (1 reference). Canon tech-overview.md needs a patch on master.
Lifecycle schema, default template, create_lifecycle.py, approach-phase PR/lifecycle step, kickoff/archive include lifecycle.json, tests
Status merge detection and lifecycle/PR docs (SKILL, HOW-TO, CLAUDE)
Optional open_pr.py: gh/glab/Bitbucket URL/fallback
Lifecycle and PRs: lifecycle.json, create_lifecycle, status merge detection, open_pr, SKILL/HOW-TO/CLAUDE
Added process preview messages to emergence subagents (tweak.md, bug-fix.md, clarify.md): step 0 shows spec phase steps at start; post-approval message shows kickoff-through-implementation path
Remove Cicadas copyright from generated spec templates

Added Code Review subagent (emergence/code-review.md) with full and lightweight review modes covering task completeness, acceptance criteria, arch conformance, module scope, Reflect completeness, security, correctness, and code quality. Updated SKILL.md with new operation, autonomy boundary, and Builder commands. Fixed pre-existing lint errors in history.py and test_init.py.

Shipped Code Review agent operation: emergence/code-review.md subagent with full mode (feat/ branches) and lightweight mode (fix/, tweak/ branches). 8-check review algorithm covering task completeness, acceptance criteria, arch conformance, module scope, Reflect completeness, security (OWASP), correctness (9 bug patterns), and code quality. Ephemeral advisory report with merge verdict. SKILL.md updated with operation, autonomy boundary, and Builder commands.
Add rovodev install target: .rovodev/skills/cicadas symlink; docs and canon updated
Reflect+tasks+CR before commit on feat/; implementation guardrails in skill for all envs; install.sh SKILL.md for Cursor; CLAUDE.md env note
